expectations.text: Uses the prior conversation as context instead of restarting requirement discovery from scratch
expectations.evidence: It continues from the existing approval-center conversation and summarizes already confirmed scope, roles, outcomes, and pending items.

expectations.text: Provides a pre-generation review that separates confirmed points from unresolved or risky items
expectations.evidence: It explicitly lists confirmed items under '目前我理解的已确认内容是' and then calls out one remaining blocking point about fixed versus multi-level approval.

expectations.text: Asks explicitly whether to begin final downstream-prompt generation instead of generating immediately after '差不多了'
expectations.evidence: It asks for one more blocking clarification and says it can judge readiness after that, but it does not ask for permission to begin generation in this turn.

eval_feedback.overall: Interesting baseline behavior: it now performs a partial late-stage review better than the edited skill on this eval, but still does not reach explicit generation authorization.
